title: pilosella × bifurca subsp. pachyclada
intro: Pilosella × bifurca subsp. pachyclada is a rare, hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, calming digestive issues, and promoting the healing of skin conditions. Pilosella × bifurca subsp. pachyclada can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
